banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: A private individual importing a used car purchased from a motor dealer in Great Britain, declaring it at an NCTS centre.

eligibilityOutcome.summary: importerType is private_individual, so the flow reaches the declaration step rather than exiting to the authorised-trader (VRTVPD1/ROS) channel.

collectedValues.label: Are you registering this vehicle as a private individual or as an authorised trader?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Form VRTVPD1 'Persons who hold a trader's licence...' vs Form VRTVPD2 'Persons other than authorised traders' — revenue.ie VRT forms listing

collectedValues.label: Is the vehicle new or used?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Revenue 'Registering an imported vehicle' — new-vehicle vs used-vehicle document requirements

collectedValues.label: Where was the vehicle immediately before it entered Ireland?
collectedValues.sourceRef: NCTS VRT FAQ / Revenue guidance on post-Brexit imports — customs Master Reference Number (MRN) required for non-EU/Great Britain imports

collectedValues.label: VIN / Chassis No.
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 1 — Vehicle Details: 'VIN / Chassis No.' (field Text2)

collectedValues.label: Foreign Registration No.
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 1 — Vehicle Details: 'Foreign Registration No.' (field Text1)

collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 1 — Vehicle Details: 'Make' (field Text3)

collectedValues.label: Model
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 1 — Vehicle Details: 'Model' (field Text5)

collectedValues.label: Version
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 1 — Vehicle Details: 'Version' (field Text4)

collectedValues.label: Type of Seller (please tick one)
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 2 — Person / Business From Whom The Vehicle Was Purchased: 'Type of Seller (please tick one): Motor Dealer / Auction House / Other Business / Private Individual' (field Check Box27)

collectedValues.label: Name / Business Name
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 2: 'Name / Business Name:' (field Text10)

collectedValues.label: Address
collectedValues.value: 14 Northgate Road, Leeds, LS1 4AB, United Kingdom
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 2: 'Address:' (field Text11)

collectedValues.label: Contact Number
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 2: 'Contact Number:' (field Text12)

collectedValues.label: VAT Number (if applicable)
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 2: 'VAT Number (if applicable):' (field TextVAT)

collectedValues.label: Email Address (if available)
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 2: 'Email Address (if available):' (field Text14)

collectedValues.label: Website (if available)
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 2: 'Website (if available):' (field Text15)

collectedValues.label: Purchase Price (incl. VAT)
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 4 — Vehicle Purchase Details: 'Purchase Price (incl. VAT):' (field Text16)

collectedValues.label: VAT Amount (if applicable)
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 4: 'VAT Amount* (if applicable): ... * If the vehicle was not purchased from a Private Individual, please provide VAT amount details.' (field Text18)

collectedValues.label: Date of Sale / Purchase
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 4: 'Date of Sale / Purchase:' (field Text17)

collectedValues.label: Date of Entry into the State
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Section 4: 'Date of Entry into the State:' (field Text19); ncts.ie VRT FAQ — 7-day booking window and 30-day registration deadline

collectedValues.label: Name (Block Letters)
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Declaration: 'Name (Block Letters):' (field Text22)

collectedValues.label: Date
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Declaration: 'Date:' (field Text20)

collectedValues.label: PPSN / Revenue Customer No.
collectedValues.sourceRef: VRTVPD2 Declaration: 'PPSN / Revenue Customer No.:' (field Text21)

documentsChecklist.label: Photo identification
documentsChecklist.sourceRef: ncts.ie VRT FAQ / Revenue 'Procedure at NCTS Centre' — documents required at inspection

documentsChecklist.label: Invoice or Declaration of Sale from the vehicle seller
documentsChecklist.sourceRef: VRTVPD2: 'An Invoice / Declaration of Sale from the vehicle seller must accompany this form.'

documentsChecklist.label: Proof of address
documentsChecklist.sourceRef: ncts.ie VRT FAQ — utility bill or bank statement no more than 6 months old, or two independent online statements (one of them banking)

documentsChecklist.label: Documentary evidence of PPSN
documentsChecklist.sourceRef: ncts.ie VRT FAQ — PPSN of the registered owner plus documentary proof (e.g. Public Services Card, P60)

documentsChecklist.label: Evidence of the vehicle's date of entry into the State
documentsChecklist.sourceRef: ncts.ie VRT FAQ — shipping/travel documents (or customs MRN for non-EU/GB imports) evidencing date of entry

documentsChecklist.label: Customs declaration (Master Reference Number)
documentsChecklist.sourceRef: NCTS/Revenue guidance on post-Brexit imports — customs MRN required for Great Britain / other non-EU imports

documentsChecklist.label: Foreign registration certificate or de-registration certificate
documentsChecklist.sourceRef: Revenue 'Registering an imported vehicle' — used vehicles: foreign registration certificate (e.g. UK V5C) or de-registration certificate

documentsChecklist.label: CO2-at-manufacture and NOx emissions confirmation
documentsChecklist.sourceRef: Revenue 'Registering an imported vehicle' — used vehicles: CO2-at-manufacture confirmation and NOx emissions confirmation

documentsChecklist.label: EU Certificate of Conformity (or individual vehicle approval certificate)
documentsChecklist.sourceRef: Revenue 'Registering an imported vehicle' — new vehicles: hard-copy EU Certificate of Conformity or IVA/NSSTA certificate (also uploaded in advance via myAccount/ROS)

documentsChecklist.label: Signed declaration (VRTVPD2)
documentsChecklist.statement: I, the undersigned, declare that I purchased the vehicle detailed above, and that the information contained on this form and in the supporting documents is correct.

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (ie/revenue/vehicle-registration-tax-vrt). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to Revenue, NCTS, or any government system. A human (the importer) must review every value below, gather the physical documents listed in documentsChecklist, book a real NCTS inspection appointment, and complete and sign the actual Form VRTVPD2 in person — this packet is illustrative mock data, not a substitute for that live process. VRT/NOx amounts are not modelled or estimated here; Revenue computes them at the inspection centre from the vehicle's actual OMSP and emissions data.
